subcodes.first_line: We have sent forth unto the world that which shall draw them nigh unto the Most Exalted Paradise, yet most among the people remain heedless [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا ارسلنا الی العالم ما یقربهم الی الفردوس الاعلی ولکن الناس اکثرهم من
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @personal instructions, @call to action, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God
